message:
chore: update Cargo.lock with franken-decision, franken-evidence, franken-kernel workspace crates

Add three new workspace crates (franken-decision, franken-evidence,
franken-kernel) and their transitive dependencies (hmac, sha2, subtle)
to Cargo.lock, reflecting workspace manifest additions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,7 +63,11 @@ dependencies = [
  "base64",
  "bincode",
  "crossbeam-queue",
+ "franken-decision",
+ "franken-evidence",
+ "franken-kernel",
  "getrandom 0.3.4",
+ "hmac",
  "libc",
  "nix",
  "parking_lot",
@@ -73,6 +77,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "sha1",
+ "sha2",
  "slab",
  "smallvec",
  "socket2",
@@ -422,6 +427,7 @@ checksum = "9ed9a281f7bc9b7576e61468ba615a66a5c8cfdff42420a70aa82701a3b1e292"
 dependencies = [
  "block-buffer",
  "crypto-common",
+ "subtle",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -485,6 +491,30 @@ version = "0.2.0"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "77ce24cb58228fbb8aa041425bb1050850ac19177686ea6e0f41a70416f56fdb"
 
+[[package]]
+name = "franken-decision"
+version = "0.1.0"
+dependencies = [
+ "franken-evidence",
+ "franken-kernel",
+ "serde",
+]
+
+[[package]]
+name = "franken-evidence"
+version = "0.1.0"
+dependencies = [
+ "serde",
+ "serde_json",
+]
+
+[[package]]
+name = "franken-kernel"
+version = "0.1.0"
+dependencies = [
+ "serde",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "fsci-arrayapi"
 version = "0.1.0"
@@ -597,6 +627,7 @@ name = "ftui-render"
 version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
  "bitflags 2.10.0",
+ "bumpalo",
  "ftui-core",
  "memchr",
  "smallvec",
@@ -738,6 +769,15 @@ version = "0.5.2"

 checksum = "fc0fef456e4baa96da950455cd02c081ca953b141298e41db3fc7e36b1da849c"
 
+[[package]]

+dependencies = [
+ "digest",
+]
+
 [[package]]

 version = "2.3.0"
@@ -1421,6 +1461,17 @@ dependencies = [
  "digest",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "sha2"

+checksum = "a7507d819769d01a365ab707794a4084392c824f54a7a6a7862f8c3d0892b283"
